statement.markdown:
heading: ## Animated Counter
description: Create an animated counter that increments or decrements every second.
requirements
1. The counter should be displayed on the screen with the initial value of 0.
2. The counter should increment by 1 every second.
3. The counter should decrement by 1 every second when the button is clicked.

starterCode.html:
Animated Counter

0

gradingCriteria.description: The counter increments by 1 every second.
The counter decrements by 1 every 2 seconds when the decrement button is clicked.
The counter increments or decrements correctly when the buttons are clicked.
